timeline.compressToSummary: AI Compress: merge selected events into a summary

characters.noRelationships: No relationships recorded yet. AI will record them as characters interact.

locations.title: Scene Memory
locations.noLocationsHint: Enable 'Settings → Scene Memory' and AI will record location features on first visit.

rpg.userOnlyHint: Toggle: all RPG modules track USER only (can also set per module)

settings.configProfileHint: Export all toggles, protagonist-only settings, custom prompts, RPG config as a file (excludes auto-summary & vector settings). Card authors can share configs for one-click setup.
settings.showTopIconHint: When off, the top icon is completely hidden. Re-enable via Extensions panel → Horae Memory.
settings.panelWidthHint: Panel width as % of chat area (50-100). Reduce for widescreen themes. Right offset fine-tunes horizontal position.
settings.themeHint: Choose a built-in theme or import custom themes. Imported theme files (.json) appear in the dropdown.
settings.customCssHint: Enter custom CSS to override plugin styles. For advanced users. Changes apply on blur.
settings.contextDepthHint:
Controls how many 'Normal' level events are sent to AI:
0 = No normal events (Important/Critical still sent)
15 = Last 15 normal events (default)
Higher values = more tokens consumed
settings.forgetThresholdHint:
Controls event forgetting speed (Retention Value):
0.2 = Default
Higher = Faster forgetting
Frequently accessed events resist forgetting.
settings.injectionPositionHint:
Where Horae injects state info in AI prompts:
0 = End (closest to latest message)
1 = Second from end (recommended)
Higher = further up
settings.sendToAiHint: Control what info is sent with prompts. Disabling saves tokens but AI won't 'remember' that info.
settings.sendTimelineHint: Event summaries & relative time. Without it, AI can't know what happened 'days ago'.
settings.sendCharactersHint: Present characters, costumes, affection, NPC info. Without it, AI may describe wrong outfits.
settings.sendItemsHint: Currently held items & locations. Without it, AI may create items from nothing.
settings.sendLocationMemoryHint: Records fixed physical features of locations for consistent scene descriptions across turns.
settings.sendRelationshipsHint: Tracks relationship changes between characters (friends, lovers, enemies, etc.).
settings.sendMoodHint: Tracks emotional/psychological state changes for consistent character emotions.
settings.rpgModeHint: When enabled, AI outputs character stats (HP/MP/SP) and skill changes in <horaerpg> tags.
settings.antiParaphraseHint: For play styles where USER writes their own actions. AI's <horae> tags will also account for the previous USER message.
settings.sideplayModeHint: Adds a 'Mark as side story' button. Marked messages are not tracked by Horae or included in auto-summaries.
settings.autoSummaryHint:
Auto-compresses old events into AI-generated summaries to save tokens.
Compressed summaries can be expanded back to original events.
settings.customTablesHint:
Create Excel-style tables for AI to fill. Long-press headers to add/remove rows/columns.
Local tables save per-chat; Character tables bind to a character card (structure follows the card, data is per-chat); Global tables are shared.
Click the scope icon to switch. 🔒 Lock rows/columns to prevent AI edits.
settings.uiLanguageHint: Plugin UI display language. "Auto Detect" selects based on browser/tavern settings.
settings.aiOutputLanguageHint: Controls the language AI uses in horae tags (event summaries, NPC descriptions, etc.). Format markers stay unchanged, only descriptive text is affected.
settings.keepRecentHint: The last N messages will NEVER be summarized. Ensures recent plot details are fully preserved.
settings.autoSummaryExample:
Example: if Keep=10, Buffer Limit=20 (message mode)
→ At message 50: messages 41-50 are absolutely kept
→ Among messages 1-40, if unsummarized count exceeds 20, auto-summary triggers
→ Each summary processes one batch per the settings below; remaining waits for next round
Simply put: Keep + Buffer = how many messages before summarization starts
settings.batchMaxMessagesHint: Max messages per auto-summary batch. Large archives will be processed in multiple rounds.
settings.batchMaxTokensHint:
Token limit per summary batch; excess is truncated.
Refer to model context windows (recommend 30%-50%):
Claude ≈ 80K-200K · GPT-4o ≈ 80K-128K · Gemini ≈ 100K-1000K · DeepSeek ≈ 64K
settings.useIndependentApiHint: Enter an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Summary generation will use this endpoint independently, without occupying the main tavern connection.
settings.summaryApiUrlHint: OpenAI-compatible endpoint base URL, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1
settings.summaryFetchModelsHint: Fill in URL and key, then click to fetch. A low-cost model will suffice.
settings.subApiHint:
Once configured, auto-summary will generate via independent HTTP requests in parallel, without affecting the main tavern API.
Supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints (OpenAI, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, etc.).
Connection test only queries model list, no generation credits consumed.

If you have customized prompts, please go to Settings → Custom Prompts and click 'Restore Default' for each prompt to get the correct language version.

Prompts that haven't been customized will switch automatically.

modal.mobileVectorWarningBody: Mobile device detected. Local vector models are memory-intensive and may cause OOM crashes. Strongly recommend switching to API mode.

label.summaryRangeHint: Floors in this range will be skipped by auto-summary

label.author: Author

badge.sideplayMarked: This message is marked as a side story

tutorial.step1Content:
This plugin lets AI automatically track story states.
Horae attaches <horae> tags to AI replies, auto-recording time, scenes, characters, items and more.

Let me walk you through the core features. Follow the prompts.
tutorial.step2Content:
If you have old chat logs, use 'AI Smart Summary' to batch-fill <horae> tags first.
AI will re-read history and generate structured timeline data.

New conversations need no action — the plugin works automatically.
tutorial.step3Content:
When enabled, old messages beyond the threshold are auto-summarized and hidden, saving tokens.

Note: This requires existing timeline data (<horae> tags).
For old records, use 'AI Smart Summary' first before enabling this.
· If auto-summary keeps failing, go to the Event Timeline and manually multi-select + full-text summarize.
tutorial.step4Content:
A recall feature for Auto Summary users. After compression, old message details are lost. Vector memory auto-retrieves relevant snippets from hidden timelines when conversations touch past events.

Should you enable it?
· If you use Auto Summary with many messages → recommended
· If you don't use Auto Summary, few messages, plenty of tokens → not needed

Source options:
· Local Model: Runs in browser, no API costs. First use downloads a ~30-60MB model.
⚠️ OOM Warning: Local models may cause page freeze/blank screen from memory issues. Switch to API mode if this happens.
· API: Uses a remote Embedding model (not your LLM chat model). Embedding models are lightweight, extremely low cost.
Recommended: Free Embedding models from SiliconFlow (e.g. BAAI/bge-m3).

Fulltext Review: High-confidence results can send original message text for richer context. Adjust count and threshold freely; set to 0 to disable.
tutorial.step5Content:
Controls how many timeline events are sent to AI.

· Default 15 means only 'Normal' events from the last 15 messages are sent
· 'Important' and 'Critical' events are always sent, regardless of depth
· Set to 0 to only send 'Important' and 'Critical' events

Usually no adjustment needed. Higher values = more tokens consumed.
tutorial.step6Content:
Controls where Horae injects state info in the conversation.

· Default 1 means inject after the second-to-last message
· If your preset includes summaries or World Info with similar functions, they may conflict with Horae's timeline format
· Adjust this value or disable overlapping features in your preset (recommended)

Tip: No need to run multiple similar features — pick one.
tutorial.step7Content:
Customize various prompts to adjust AI behavior:
· System Injection Prompt — Rules for AI to output <horae> tags
· AI Smart Summary Prompt — Rules for batch timeline extraction
· AI Analysis Prompt — Rules for single-message deep analysis
· Plot Compression Prompt — Rules for summary compression

Recommended to modify only after getting familiar with the plugin. Leave empty for defaults.
tutorial.step8Content:
Create Excel-style tables for AI to fill in (e.g. skill tables, faction tables).

Key tips:
· Headers must be clearly written — AI uses them to understand what to fill
· Each table's 'fill prompt' must be specific for accurate results
· Some models (e.g. free-tier Gemini) have weaker table comprehension
tutorial.step9Content:
The following features are off by default, suited for detailed RP:

· Scene Memory — Records fixed physical features of locations for consistent descriptions
· Relationship Network — Tracks relationship changes between characters (friends, lovers, rivals, etc.)
· Mood Tracking — Tracks emotional/psychological state changes
· RPG Mode — Enables stat bars (HP/MP/SP), attribute radar charts, skill lists and status tracking

Enable these in 'Content Sent to AI' settings as needed.
tutorial.step10Content:
For new conversations, no extra setup needed — the plugin auto-attaches tags to AI replies and builds the timeline.

To review this tutorial, find 'Restart Tutorial' at the bottom of Settings.

Happy RP! 🎉

vector.title: Vector Memory (Semantic Search)
vector.hint:
Use vector search on Horae tag data to auto-recall relevant history for AI.
Local Mode: Downloads ~25MB quantized model to browser cache, uses 50-80MB memory. Not recommended for devices with <2GB RAM or cloud taverns. Ensure --max-old-space-size is configured.
API Mode: Uses remote Embedding API, no local resources needed.
vector.diffusionEnabledHint: Automatically spreads activation to fetch temporally adjacent and semantically related (same POV) memories for coherent context.
vector.quantizationHint: q4 suits most devices; q8 has higher accuracy but double the size.
vector.apiWarning:
Only Embedding models allowed!
Do NOT enter LLM chat models (like gemini 3, gpt-4, etc.) or errors will occur.
Recommended: text-embedding-v3 (Qwen), text-embedding-3-small (OpenAI)
vector.fetchModelsHint:
Fill in URL and key, then click to fetch.
Recommended: text-embedding-v3 (Qwen) / text-embedding-3-small (OpenAI)
vector.pureModeHint:
For high-dimensional API models (e.g. Qwen3-Embedding, text-embedding-3-large).
Disables keyword expansion, event phrase matching, high-frequency penalty, etc.
Relies fully on model's semantic understanding, reducing low-quality noise.
Do NOT enable for small or low-dimensional models, as recall quality will degrade.
vector.rerankHint:
After vector recall, use a Rerank model for fine-grained re-ranking, significantly improving recall accuracy.
Pushes truly relevant results to the top.
Requires an additional Rerank model API (different from Embedding).
Recommended: Qwen3-Reranker, bge-reranker-v2-m3, bce-reranker
vector.rerankFetchHint:
Fill in URL and key, then click to fetch.
Recommended: gte-rerank (Qwen) / jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual (Jina)
vector.rerankFulltextHint:
By default Rerank uses summaries. When enabled, uses original message fulltext for precision ranking.
Can capture details missed by summaries, but requires long-context model support.
Only for long-context Rerank models (e.g. Qwen3-Reranker, 32K).
bge-reranker-v2-m3 (≤1024) and bce-reranker (≤512): Do NOT enable.
vector.topKHint: Recalls the K most relevant memories per message for context injection.
vector.thresholdHint: Memories below this threshold won't be recalled. Increase to reduce noise.
vector.fulltextCountHint: Top N results meeting the fulltext threshold send original text instead of summaries. Set to 0 to disable.
vector.fulltextThresholdHint: Only high-confidence results meeting this threshold send fulltext, avoiding token waste on irrelevant content.
vector.stripTagsHint:
Comma-separated tag names. Content wrapped in these tags will be removed in:
· Vector search fulltext review & Rerank fulltext precision
· Timeline parsing: prevents sideplay horae tags from polluting main timeline
· AI smart summary: strips before sending to AI
HTML comments are stripped by default.

prompts.title: Custom Prompts
prompts.hint: Customize rule prompts sent to AI. After modification, AI will output tags according to your rules. Use preset archives to quickly switch between character card configs.

ui.insertSummaryPlaceholder:
Enter summary content to replace deleted timeline events...

Note: Do not delete the initial timeline events, or relative time calculations and age progression will break.
ui.eventCompressDesc: Compress from extracted event summaries. Fast, but info limited to what's recorded in the timeline.
ui.fulltextSummaryDesc: Re-reads full message text for richer details, but consumes more tokens.
ui.clickToToggleScope: Click to toggle scope (local → character → global)
ui.tablePromptPlaceholder: Prompt: Tell AI how to fill this table...
ui.multipleEventsNote: This message has {{n}} events, showing first only
ui.generatingFulltextSummary: Re-reading full text to generate summary...
ui.scopeGlobalDesc: Global table, shared across all chats
ui.scopeCharacterDesc: Character table, bound to current character card
ui.scopeGlobalFull: Global (shared across all chats, data stored per character card)
ui.scopeCharacterFull: Character (structure bound to card, data per-chat)
ui.skillsInCard: Skills are shown in the character card above. Click + to add manually.
ui.noSkillsAddManually: No skills. Click + to add manually.
ui.noReputationCategories: No reputation categories. Click + to add.
ui.noReputationValues: No reputation data (auto-updates after AI reply)
ui.noEquipCharData: No character data (auto-updates after AI reply, or add manually)
ui.noCustomTemplates: No custom templates (built-in templates cannot be deleted)
ui.noStrongholds: No strongholds (click + to add, or AI creates via base: tags in <horae>)
ui.noLevelData: No level data (auto-updates after AI reply, or click the button above to add manually)
ui.sameSourceTarget: Source and target cannot be the same
ui.npcNameChangePlaceholder: After renaming, old name is auto-saved as alias
ui.pinAsMainChar: Mark as main character (pinned + special border)
ui.quickScanTitle: Extract formatted data from text (no API cost)
ui.aiAnalyzeTitle: Use AI to analyze message content (costs API)
ui.templateReplaceHint: Loading will replace this character's slot config. You can still add/remove individual slots after.
ui.templateManageHint: Built-in templates are not listed here. Below are user-saved templates.
ui.reputationSubitemHint: Sub-item names (leave empty for AI to decide). Shown under reputation categories for detail.
ui.localVectorWarningP1: Embedding model is very large (~400MB), loading in browser will use a lot of memory and may crash.
ui.localVectorWarningP2: Strongly recommend switching to "API Mode" (e.g. SiliconFlow free embedding model) for zero memory pressure.
ui.pendingScanDesc:
Last AI scan wrote data for {{n}} messages but review was not completed.

Choose an action:
ui.tokenLimitHint: Larger value means more messages per batch and fewer generations, but may exceed model limits.
ui.extractInfoHint: Extract info from history text. After extraction, review and adjust each item in the review dialog.
ui.stripTagsHint: Comma-separated tag names. Matched blocks will be removed before sending to AI (e.g. side scenes).
ui.stripTagsHint2: Also applies to timeline parsing and vector retrieval, synced with vector settings.
ui.tokenModeHint: Enter token limit. Auto-compression triggers when exceeded.
ui.tokenModeHint3: Recommend setting to 30%~50% of model context window, leaving room for other content.
ui.messageModeHint: Enter message count. Auto-compression triggers when exceeded.
ui.messageModeHint2: Messages beyond "recent messages to keep" will be compressed to summaries when this count is reached.
